Detailed Description

Device Functionality - Temperature Compensation
System ID: 0x26

+---------------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+-------------------------------------------+
| Register Name             | Id   | Type        | Unit | Range | Default | Comment                                   |
+===========================+======+=============+======+=======+=========+===========================================+
| mode                      | 0x00 |float 32-bit |None  |       |         |                                           |
+---------------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+-------------------------------------------+
| alpha                     | 0x01 |float 32-bit |None  |       |         |                                           |
+---------------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+-------------------------------------------+
| downsample                | 0x02 |int  32-bit  |None  |       |         |                                           |
+---------------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+-------------------------------------------+
